purpose: Canonical functional contract for benchmark todo apps implemented in multiple web frameworks.
implementationConstraints: Serve as a single-page local web app with no backend dependency.
Keep state in memory only so every page reload resets to the same seeded todos.
Keep user-visible copy, seeded data, scenario task ids, and bug pack ids identical across framework ports.
Allow implementation-specific component structure and styling, but preserve the accessible labels, button text, and flows defined here.

ui.heroLead: Small todo app for local web QA runs, prompt-guided exploration, and bug-pack parity across frameworks.
ui.newTaskPlaceholder: Add a task for the benchmark run

summary: Remaining count equals total todos minus completed todos.
Progress text follows the template '{completed} of {total} tasks done'.
Summary reflects the full todo list, not just the currently filtered subset.
addTask: Submitting a non-empty draft trims surrounding whitespace, appends one new todo, and clears the composer input.
Submitting an empty or whitespace-only draft leaves the list unchanged.
toggleTask: Toggling a todo inverts its done state.
Completion updates both summary cards and changes which filters include the item.
filtering: Active shows only todos with done=false.
Completed shows only todos with done=true.
editTask: Starting edit mode copies the selected todo text into the edit input.
Saving an edit trims surrounding whitespace and persists the updated text if the result is non-empty.
Cancelling an edit discards the draft and exits edit mode.
Pressing Enter while editing saves the draft.
Pressing Escape while editing cancels the draft.
removeTask: Removing a todo deletes it from the in-memory list immediately.
nonFeatures: No bulk actions, ordering, due dates, or remote data.

tasks.instruction: Open the app and verify the page title Todo Bench is visible.
Verify the summary shows 2 tasks remaining when the app first loads.
Add a new task called Review benchmark notes and verify it appears in the task list.
Mark the task Draft Stagehand checklist as completed and verify the summary shows 1 of 2 tasks done.
Switch to the Active filter and verify the completed task Draft Stagehand checklist is no longer visible.
Edit the existing task Plan todo benchmark so it reads Plan todo benchmark outline and verify the updated text is visible.
Create a new task called Remove benchmark draft, delete it, and verify it is no longer visible in the task list.

canonicalStates: Initial loaded board with the seeded todos visible.
A state where one todo is completed and the summary reflects progress.
A state where the Active filter is selected.
A state where one todo is in inline edit mode.

bugPacks.title: Created todos lose the user-provided label
bugPacks.description: New tasks are created with a fixed generic label instead of the text entered in the composer.
parityRules: Break only task creation text persistence.
Allow the add flow to continue creating a new todo row so the failure stays observable at the assertion layer.

bugPacks.title: Completion toggle does not update todo state
bugPacks.description: Clicking the checkbox leaves todo completion unchanged, so progress and active filtering remain incorrect.
parityRules: Break only the completion state transition.
Keep the checkbox/action visible so the runner can reproduce the failure through the normal UI.

bugPacks.title: Editing a todo does not persist the updated text
bugPacks.description: Saving an edited task leaves the original label unchanged, so the updated text never appears in the list.
parityRules: Break only edit persistence after Save or Enter.
Keep edit mode, save controls, and non-edit flows operational.
